review_title: All around perfect solution for all types of businesses.
author: Joshua C.
pros: I love how this app was thought through very carefully. Everything you need is literally within the app.
cons: I wasn’t very fond of the lack of offerings for integration. More partnerships would help with that.

review_title: Easy to use and collaborate with websites, great customer service.
description: Positive experience, was easy to add it onto my website and clients loved the personalised client portal. I had many complements when using vcita.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Friendly yet professional customer service. Quick response rate. Professional looking features that add onto websites with ease.
cons: It was an expensive product, I felt I should have been given more credit for phone messages and confirmations included with the package. As a sole staff member perhaps a cheaper version for individual use.

author: Brianna T.
pros: The client management and invoicing was convenient. The email notifications for each invoice was also helpful.
cons: Vcita raised their prices very high after I was a loyal customer for more than a year. The price was no longer worth the offering.

review_title: Vcita is invaluable to my business
description: I've been using Vcita for four years now, and it is really a rock-solid application that is invaluable to my coaching and my business
author: Joe W.
pros: What I love about it is the fact that it brings everything together. All aspects of my coaching I can handle through Vcita, and I love the fact that they're always upgrading and improving the services
cons: Sometimes, the calendar still takes a while to load. This is the same for desktop, iPad, and phone.

description: Vcita is a powerful platform for us small businesses and they have been a joy too work with and I'm excited when new features go live. They are always updating and enhancing our experiences.
author: David S.
pros: Vcita took away most of my anxiety around how to best to communicate with my clients. They allowed the user experience to become a white glove experience.
cons: I like the least the way I have to set up my packages. I recently uploaded new packages and the amount had to match what I already had for itemized items. It was not the best experience. Ii had to go back and change costs of services to match the packages. I should be able to set my prices the wya I see it.

review_title: worked well for a customers and for user interface
description: we have used it for years for our home business and it has helped us keep up with customer's, ease for scheduling for them and contact/follow-up
author: ethan M.
pros: value for money, customer capture, ease of setup is good and being able to make changes on the fly to adapt to market/compliance shifts
cons: adding simple things costs money, basic is basic but effective if you keep up with customers, but overall it works well for getting customer's scheduled and informed

description: I’ve used vcita for nearly 10 years. I only stay because I’m familiar with it but I barely use all the functions. I like the scheduling calendar and ability to take notes. That’s really all I use it for. The mobile app has constant issues loading so I don’t use it much. For the price the app should absolutely be better.
author: John M.
pros: Easy to use for non-technical people. I like the widgets best for booking appointments.
cons: Expensive with no option to eliminate unneeded features. The mobile app is one star because it always has issues loading.

description: Professional client portals and easy online booking/payment options are popular with clients. Good experience overall.
author: cory R.
pros: centralizing scheduling, payments, and client communication, with strong points being easy online booking
cons: There are some missing features like robust inventory tracking or advanced color-coding, leading to glitches.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: All-in-One Solution That Simplifies Client Management and Scheduling
description: Overall, vcita has made a big difference in how I run my business. It’s easy to use, reliable, and helps me stay on top of clients and payments. While it’s not perfect, the convenience and time saved are worth it. I’d definitely recommend it to other service-based professionals.
author: Emma Jean W.
pros: I really like how vcita combines scheduling, invoicing, client management, and payments into one easy-to-use platform. The client portal and automated reminders make managing bookings effortless. It saves me hours each week and helps my business look more professional. Everything just feels streamlined and well-organized.
cons: Customization for forms and reports is somewhat limited. A few more integrations or automation options would make it even better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It takes a lot of time to login and sometimes you are not even able to login in.
author: Gurucharan J.
pros: Calender system -: You can create schedules according to your time in its calendar
cons: Dashboard is not working properly That troubles me a lot sometimes They should solve this problem
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, the Vcita team takes care of their customers, they listen and they are helpful. I truly believe they do not shy away from what could improve the product. I would be great to see their engineering team increase in compacity to provide some customer wish list items
author: Ernest C.
pros: Simple to use, simple for a team to grasp and implement and generally speaking relikable
cons: The abilities to customize the software

description: Fantastic. We implemented vcita in a very short time and became immediately proficient in using it. It was that easy. The Zoom integration was the clincher for us- it is, by far, the best video platform on the market!
author: John S.
pros: Zoom integration! Appointment management is simple and intuitive. We are able to invoice clients simply without a worrisome billing system. Incredible communication tools built into the system. Notifications/Reminders.
cons: I wish we had a way to allow the client to set the amount he/she would like to or is able to pay. Sometimes it is difficult to do the reckoning between reports in vcita and stripe.

review_title: Great for scheduling, other features not so much
description: I was using acuity but looked for other software, because of hippa option. I was ecstatic to see the client portal, unfortunately it is not optimal. Most features however aren’t hippa compliant. Really I only use client portal for scheduling and share patient handouts. Patients don’t have to log in like other apps, as it recognizing emails. Overall I do think it offers more than competition , but make sure you try every part to see what works for you and what doesn’t. Also customer service must be more present. Even after you pay they limit features until you use for a while , which is ridiculous. They will be better if they make conscious effort to improve
author: Asha I.
pros: Able to customize scheduling page to be more professional and to distinguish services offered. Like the idea of client portal. Clients can go to portal to pay , schedule and can share documents. Works for me who share patient education handouts.
cons: Some additional features are really glitchy and most features of the client portal I can’t use. When customers pay online , they are not taken to confirmation page or automated message . Messaging IS NOT secure , sometimes links In messages, don’t work. Documents are not secure. So since I’m using for health business, I had to get another program for secure messaging . Customer service good when you can each them, there is a 2 hour window only to call in a 24 hour day. Chat is not always available during business hours. It’s even worse if you are on east coast.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: What vCita Has Done for Us
description: Our experience has been great! We've been using vCita for approximately 10 years, and it's the best decision we've ever made.
author: Neil D.
pros: vCita is my one-stop solution to marketing, booking, and collections. They've made it so easy that now I can just concentrate on what we do as a business and don't have to think about anything else. They are an integral part of our success.
cons: There are no negatives. My only concern is what would I do if vCita ever went away!

description: Overall, it is a great product that we do recommend.
author: Diana B.
pros: The ease of use for my clients is the top reason we love VCita.
cons: It isn't as customizable as we would like and we cannot track inventory.

description: It allows me to track interactions through customizable reports.
author: Theresa A.
pros: The app is flexible and user-friendly. I also like the customized email templates it offers.
cons: I suggest that the customer support team improve their response time, as it is currently slow.
author_profession: Social Media Manager and Seo Content Writer
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: INCONSITANCY with the App. not only with loading time but can't log in several times a month for a week or so then "magically" we can log in (what the heck?? !!!)
author: STEVE P.
pros: When it works, it's fine BUT when it doesn't load it's a damn Nigh mare burning Executive TIME and we alll know Time is Money. Not having a Live Body Customer Service Dept. in an insult from any service provider to their customers.
cons: When I or my staff can't log in on our cell or desktop, we cannot solve even with resetting the password which an inconvenience. 2nd Google's Vcita's 800 & 855#'s for Customer Service DO NOT WORK and there is no other way to contact them except for AI bot questions with standard answers that do not help THUS TOTAL LACK OF CUSTOMER SERVICE which in this day and age is frankly pathetic. Plenty of similar services out there and exercise caution if you are considering Vcita.

review_title: I Love Vcita for Small Business!
description: Excellent!
author: Christa C.
pros: This by far is the best user-friendly platform I have seen and implemented. I have used several types of CRMs over the years, but this works by far the best for me and what I am doing. I refuse to change!
cons: Like everything there is always room to grow or for improvement, but Vcita has so many apps and integrations it made it so simple to create and implement almost immediately, hardly much of learning curve at all! Vcita now has their own CC processing if you don't have one set up already with paypal, stripe or square. the only drawback is they don't batch right away and can take few days to see in account, but if that's no big deal, then Vcita is the way to go!

description: Having been a customer for several years, vCita offered an all-in-one solution that few others compared to at the time. However, very little has changed in the last 3 years other than some unnecessary aesthetic updates and very minor enhancements. I got on board fully aware that there were several missing features I needed which were on the top of the feature request list and I put in place workarounds to suffice until these features were going to be implemented. I'm talking about pretty fundamental things, like the ability for online payments to be accepted with sales tax automatically calculated, and add-on/bundled products/services. Instead of the development team addressing critical upgrades the community is begging for, we get branding updates, color scheme changes, and random issues where things that have always worked fine no longer work properly. Customer service is all but useless, and I constantly get the feeling their priorities lie in marketing the outdated product they have rather than improving it. If you try the product and feel that it accomplishes 100% of what you need it to do, go for it. But if you find that it looks great but misses the mark on a few key areas, don't jump on board hoping it will be addressed in the next decade. Keep looking. I'm done waiting.
author: Dennison T.
pros: Relatively easy to use and deploy. Client interface is mostly intuitive and easy to use.
cons: Product development is nonexistent. Customer support is a joke. On the rare occasion there is an update, I find something on my website no longer works, instead of being improved.

review_title: Great software for small business owner/solopreneur
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It enables me to easily communicate with prospective clients, book them on my calendar, and send reminders for appointments. It's great for invoices, allowing online payments and tracking of income.
cons: Sometimes it's hard to navigate to find the client or invoice I'm looking for. But honestly, there's not much to dislike.

review_title: Great product for my small business
description: I've been using it for over 2 years and I really like the product.
author: Kelli H.
pros: My clients have a secure place to connect with me and share documents. They can request appointments based on days and times that work for them. I can manage my workflow more effeciently.
cons: I wish the software had the ability to link 2 or more individuals to one business, so that they all receive the emails and requests.

description: Being able to communicate with client with ease. I like it and thinks it works well.
author: David C.
pros: The ease of the software. The way you communicate with clients.
cons: Would be nice to be able to create a web form with hyperlink to use on my website that integrates information to clients on portal. Compares to a Microsoft form. More control of the setup of the dashboard. Text messaging should be included and unlimited. Able to setup reoccurring payments from clients through system.

review_title: Software is easy to use! Online portal for clients is visually appealing
author: Meredith S.
pros: RemindersText communication with clienta
cons: I wish the payment system allowed for tips

review_title: My admin and I have several hours of additional productive time!
description: I save at least 1 hour every week, and my admin saves 2-3 hours every week . This means that our team gets a lot more done in a week than was possible with vCita.
author: Nadir S.
pros: + Ease of use - this tool is very easy to use for me, and my clients love it for the easy of use. + HUGE Time Savings - I have spent no time scheduling meetings this year, and my admin has spent less than 30 minutes. + Mobile interface - including a simple app, and SMS reminders + Overall cost + Customization + Record-keeping - I can easily search the meeting history for any of my students
cons: - Cost of SMS packages - I stopped sending reminders because it was not a great cost-benefit ratio. - Lack of group-scheduling feature.

author: David W.
pros: We have used vcita for 8 years as our business has started and grown. Easy and fun to integrate logos, designs and into website. Looks great, and clients find it easy to use. And new features are frequently added-- so appreciate victa growing as we do@
cons: I appreciate the dedication to growth and input that vcita invites from its customers.
